However. while analyzing one should not be taking into account
only planets which are 811\ to Saturn but also other plonets which are
favourably disposed. A strong Jupiter placed in 1111\ from Saturn is a
blessing. 'Similorly, Venus placed llt11 to Saturn iS an excellent thing to
have. So. while analyzing the strength with respect to profession in
terms of native's horoscope one should also the planets which are placed
u~~'~ from Satum and then make a judgment holistically.
In the Bhrigu Nadi Technique. while analyzing profession the house
where Saturn is placed should be taken as the ascendant for determining
the career path of the native. Saturn stays in a house for a period of 30
months.
What we need to do that after taking Saturn as the ascendant
